title: [BUG REPORT] Email Channel Configuration Automatically Deleting
excerpt: On the Monday Service platform, we’re finding that our email channel is being deleted automatically. Is anyone else seeing this issue?

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: On the Monday Service platform, we’re finding that our email channel is being deleted automatically. Is anyone else seeing this issue?

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes thats weird- you should def put in a ticket

posts.author: ange (Angela Norton)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I found it happened on Friday also

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Seth, Tom from monday. Sorry to hear about that Email integrations can get disconnected when there are changes made to the account on the email provider’s (Gmail/Outlook) side. Mainly password changes from what I encountered, but permission settings changes can too. If you’re not making any changes to your account and it continues to disconnect, as Eric suggested above, the best thing to do would be to write to our team either via email or chat.

posts.author: Jessaj (Jessica Hiatt )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Just chiming in to say - all 100+ of our Outlook-integrated emails disappeared from visibility a few days ago.
I also have a number of integrated shared-mailbox email addresses that my team uses via monday CRM and those became unavailable to my team-members and we’re having to re-integrate these. I opened a ticket with their support team!
